# Vendored YAML grammar

`yaml-spec-1.2.yaml` is the machine-readable YAML 1.2 grammar — the ~211 productions expressed as operator-keyed YAML —
vendored from <https://github.com/yaml/yaml-grammar> (path `yaml-spec-1.2.yaml`). It is the single source of truth that
`generator/spec2grammar.py` translates into the typed IR.
